texto: I want it said loudly and clearly that we can define racism in many ways, but it is, in my opinion, intellectually disingenuous to define it in a way that trivializes the role that racial hatred plays. Certainly, not all racism is hate-driven, but to ignore the connection between racial hate and racism is to reduce the concept of racism to a useless theoretical abstraction.
explicacao: Citação de David Pilgrim sobre temas ligados a educacao. “I want it said loudly and clearly that we can define racism in many ways, but it is, in my opinio…” articula educacao, racism, social-justice em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como social-justice.
